condition: The model is built from a thin rectangular base slab with all other visible features added as solid material rather than cut away from it. A larger raised rectangular portion occupies the rear area of the base, leaving a front strip of the base exposed. Narrow raised strips run along the left and right sides of that raised area, and a very thin transverse added feature spans across the width with a real internal opening rather than a surface mark. The vertical extents are stepped: some added material is shallow while one aligned continuation reaches deeper from the same shoulder, so the underside is not a single flat level.
note: Copied from local evaluated Text-to-CAD result; no evaluation was rerun.
